page.name: loopTiming

pad1.name: EXIT
pad1.color: repeat_start_instant righttime ? blink 0.25bt ? color green : color white : loop ? color green : color darkgreen
pad1.tooltip: EXIT LOOP AT RIGHT TIME TO PLAY

page.pad1: off & loop ? set $deckthis `get_deck` & set $deckother `param_mod 2 get_deck & param_add 1 & param_cast int` & repeat_start_instant righttime 25ms -1 & set $bar `get_beat_bar 16 & param_multiply 16` & set $barbottom `param_add 'param_multiply loop_postion -1' 'get_var $bar'` & set $bartop `param_add 'get_var $barbottom' 'get_loop'` & ( var_smaller $bartop 0 ? set $bartop +16 : var_greater $bartop 16 ? set $bartop -16 : ) & ( var_smaller $barbottom 0 ? set $barbottom +16 : var_greater $barbottom 16 ? set $barbottom -16 : ) & ( var_greater $bartop $barbottom ? set $convention 1 : set $convention 0 ) & set_deck `get_var $deckother` & set $barother `get_beat_bar 16 & param_multiply 16` & var $convention 1 ? get_var $barother & param_bigger 'get_var $bartop' ? : get_var $barother & param_smaller 'get_var $barbottom' ? : set_deck `get_var $deckthis` & loop 0 & sync & repeat_stop righttime & var slipmode 1 ? slip_mode on : : get_var $barother & param_bigger 'get_var $bartop' ? get_var $barother & param_smaller 'get_var $barbottom' ? : set_deck `get_var $deckthis` & loop 0 & sync & repeat_stop righttime & var slipmode 1 ? slip_mode on : : set_deck `get_var $deckthis` & sync & repeat_stop righttime & var slipmode 1 ? slip_mode on : : nothing
page.pad4: off & set $deckthis `get_deck` & set $deckother `param_mod 2 get_deck & param_add 1 & param_cast int` & loop 1 ? get_beat_bar 2 & param_equal 'set_deck `get_var $deckother` & get_beat_bar 2' ? loop_double : wait 0.99bt & loop_double : loop 2 ? get_beat_bar 4 & param_equal 'set_deck `get_var $deckother` & get_beat_bar 4' ? loop_double : wait 1.99bt & loop_double : loop 2 ? get_beat_bar 8 & param_equal 'set_deck `get_var $deckother` & get_beat_bar 8' ? loop_double : wait 3.99bt & loop_double : loop 0.5 ? get_beat_bar 1 & param_equal 'set_deck `get_var $deckother` & get_beat_bar 1' ? loop_double : wait 0.49bt & loop_double : loop 0.25 ? get_beat_bar 1 & param_multiply 2 & param_cast frac & param_equal 'set_deck `get_var $deckother` & get_beat_bar 1 &param_multiply 2 & param_cast frac' ? loop_double : wait 0.24bt & loop_double : loop 0.125 ? get_beat_bar 1 & param_multiply 4 & param_cast frac & param_equal 'set_deck `get_var $deckother` & get_beat_bar 1 &param_multiply 4 & param_cast frac' ? loop_double : wait 0.124bt & loop_double : loop_double
page.pad5: ( loop ? blink 1bt ? blink 0.5bt ? blink 0.25bt ? on : off : off : off ) & loop ? loop 0 & var slipmode 1 ? slip_mode on : : loop 8 & slip_mode ? set slipmode 1 & slip_mode off : set slipmode 0

shift_pad1.name: CALC
shift_pad1.color: repeat_start_instant righttime ? blink 0.25bt ? color red : color white : loop ? color red : color darkred
shift_pad1.tooltip: EXIT AT RIGHT TIME WITH JUMP

page.shift_pad1: off & loop ? set $deckthis `get_deck` & set $deckother `param_mod 2 get_deck & param_add 1 & param_cast int` & repeat_start_instant righttime 25ms -1 & set_deck `get_var $deckother` & param_equal 0 `param_add "param_smaller 0.00390625 'get_beat_bar 16'" "param_bigger 0.99609375 'get_beat_bar 16'"` ? : set_deck `get_var $deckthis` & repeat_stop righttime & loop 0 & wait 25ms & param_smaller 0.5 `get_beat_bar 16` ? set $bar `get_beat_bar 8 & param_multiply -8` & get_var $bar & param_cast relative & goto & sync & var slipmode 1 ? slip_mode on : : set $bar `get_beat_bar 8 & param_multiply -8 & param_add 8` & get_var $bar & param_cast relative & goto & sync & var slipmode 1 ? slip_mode on : :

shift_pad3.name: 0.25X
shift_pad3.color: loop ? blink 250ms ? color blue : blink 125ms ? color green : color blue : blink 250ms ? color darkblue : blink 125ms ? color darkgreen : color darkblue

shift_pad4.name: 4X
shift_pad4.color: loop ? blink 500ms ? color green : blink 250ms ? color green : color red : blink 500ms ? color darkgreen : blink 250ms ? color darkgreen : color darkred

page.shift_pad4:
off & set $deckthis `get_deck` & set $deckother `param_mod 2 get_deck & param_add 1` & loop 1 ? get_beat_bar 4 & param_equal 'set_deck `get_var $deckother` & get_beat_bar 4' ? loop 400% : param_add 'get_beat_bar 4 & param_multiply 4' 'set_deck `get_var $deckother` & get_beat_bar 4 & param_multiply -4' & param_pow 2 & param_pow 0.5 & param_multiply -1 & param_add 4 & param_cast beats & wait & loop 400% :
loop 2 ? get_beat_bar 8 & param_equal 'set_deck `get_var $deckother` & get_beat_bar 8' ? loop 400% : param_add 'get_beat_bar 8 & param_multiply 8' 'set_deck `get_var $deckother` & get_beat_bar 8 & param_multiply -8' & param_pow 2 & param_pow 0.5 & param_multiply -1 & param_add 8 & param_cast beats & wait & loop 400% :
loop 0.5 ? get_beat_bar 2 & param_equal 'set_deck `get_var $deckother` & get_beat_bar 2' ? loop 400% : set $loopBottom `param_add get_beatpos 'loop_position & param_multiply get_loop & param_multiply -1' & param_mod 2 & param_multiply 0.5` & set $loopTop `param_add get_beatpos 'loop_position & param_invert & param_multiply get_loop' & param_mod 2 & param_multiply 0.5` & repeat_start_instant rsiLoopquad 25ms -1 & var_greater $LoopBottom $LoopTop ? param_smaller 'get_var $LoopBottom' 'set_deck `get_var $deckother` & get_beat_bar 2' ! ? loop 400% & repeat_stop rsiloopquad : param_smaller 'get_var $LoopTop' 'set_deck `get_var $deckother` & get_beat_bar 2' ? loop 400% & repeat_stop rsiloopquad : : param_bigger 'get_var $LoopBottom' 'set_deck `get_var $deckother` & get_beat_bar 2' ? param_smaller 'get_var $LoopTop' 'set_deck `get_var $deckother` & get_beat_bar 2' ? loop 400% & repeat_stop rsiloopquad : : :
loop 0.25 ? get_beat_bar 1 & param_equal 'set_deck `get_var $deckother` & get_beat_bar 1' ? loop 400% : set $loopBottom `param_add get_beatpos 'loop_position & param_multiply get_loop & param_multiply -1' & param_mod 1` & set $loopTop `param_add get_beatpos 'loop_position & param_invert & param_multiply get_loop' & param_mod 1` & repeat_start_instant rsiLoopquad 25ms -1 & var_greater $LoopBottom $LoopTop ? param_smaller 'get_var $LoopBottom' 'set_deck `get_var $deckother` & get_beat_bar 1' ! ? loop 400% & repeat_stop rsiloopquad : param_smaller 'get_var $LoopTop' 'set_deck `get_var $deckother` & get_beat_bar 1' ? loop 400% & repeat_stop rsiloopquad : : param_bigger 'get_var $LoopBottom' 'set_deck `get_var $deckother` & get_beat_bar 1' ? param_smaller 'get_var $LoopTop' 'set_deck `get_var $deckother` & get_beat_bar 1' ? loop 400% & repeat_stop rsiloopquad : : : loop 400%
page.shift_pad8: off & down ? slip on : loop 0 & slip off & loop
